summary: Waitlist Automation feature testing complete. All endpoints working correctly: POST /api/waitlist creates entries with idempotent duplicate handling, Email #1 (welcome) sent immediately via Resend, 3 email jobs scheduled (step 1 sent, steps 2-3 pending), admin analytics returns funnel/rates/email stats/per-step breakdown, unsubscribe updates status and cancels pending jobs. All regression tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Waitlist endpoint properly validates email format using Pydantic EmailStr
Idempotent duplicate handling returns existing waitlist_id with duplicate=true
Email #1 sent immediately via BackgroundTasks, scheduler started for future emails
Email jobs collection tracks step, status, scheduled_for, sent_at, error
Admin analytics properly secured with admin_key check (403 on invalid key)
Unsubscribe cancels all pending jobs for the email
Background scheduler runs every 30 seconds to process pending jobs
Email templates use dark theme HTML matching app aesthetic
seed_data_creation: Created test waitlist entries during testing: waitlist-test-{timestamp}@my-alpha-ai.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Waitlist Automation (iteration 68) fully working: 1) POST /api/waitlist - creates entry, returns waitlist_id, duplicate=false on first call, duplicate=true on subsequent calls. 2) Email #1 (welcome) sent immediately via Resend (real sending). 3) 3 email jobs created in waitlist_email_jobs collection - step 1 status='sent', steps 2-3 status='pending'. 4) GET /api/waitlist/admin/analytics?admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026 returns total_waitlist, funnel (pending/activated/converted/unsubscribed), activation_rate, conversion_rate, emails stats, per_step breakdown. 5) GET /api/waitlist/unsubscribe?email=xxx updates status to 'unsubscribed' and cancels pending jobs. Background scheduler runs every 30 seconds.

tests_executed.test: POST /api/waitlist with new email creates entry
POST /api/waitlist with same email returns duplicate=true (idempotent)
3 email jobs created in waitlist_email_jobs collection
Email jobs for steps 2-3 have status='pending'

mocked_apis.note: Resend email sending is REAL (not mocked) - emails are actually sent via Resend API
